# osdgoogle_machine_types (Data Source)

List of GCP machine types available for OSD clusters in a region.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `gcp_project_id` (String) GCP project ID.
- `region` (String) GCP region (e.g., us-central1).

### Read-Only

- `items` (Attributes List) List of machine types. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Machine type ID.
- `name` (String) Machine type name.
